query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_grants FROM grants WHERE isActive = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) as problematic FROM grants WHERE name LIKE '~%' OR name LIKE '%არარელევანტური%' OR name LIKE '%დეტალები%' OR name LIKE '%თანამიმდევრულობით%' OR name LIKE '%გადაუდებელობა%' OR name LIKE '%არ ფარავს%' OR description = '' OR description IS NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user cK99zxEtGoTfC1g.7228e2c6a840 --database ne96tB4yURpkfMNLLJuy9T --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_grants FROM grants WHERE isActive = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) as problematic FROM grants WHERE name LIKE '~%' OR name LIKE '%არარელევანტური%' OR name LIKE '%დეტალები%' OR name LIKE '%თანამიმდევრულობით%' OR name LIKE '%გადაუდებელობა%' OR name LIKE '%არ ფარავს%' OR description = '' OR description IS NULL;
